languages.text: "Стойте!" {n}Противореча себе, Себериан бездействует и только беспомощно смотрит на дочь.{/n} "Дайте мне несколько минут попрощаться, {name}! О, сколь жесток {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} в своей милости, и сколь небрежен в защите..."

traits.locale_text: "Остановись!" {n}В противоположность словам, Себериан бездействует, беспомощно глядя на дочь.{/n} "Дай мне лишь несколько минут попрощаться, {name}! О, сколь жесток {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} в своей милости, и сколь небрежен в защите..."
traits.speaker: Ancestor_MeleeRanged

languages.text: "Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."
languages.original_text: "Стойте!" {n}Противореча себе, Себериан бездействует и только беспомощно смотрит на дочь.{/n} "Дайте мне несколько минут попрощаться, {name}! О, сколь жесток {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} в своей милости, и сколь небрежен в защите..."

traits.locale_text: "Wait!" {n}Contradicting himself, Seberian stands idle, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

"Wait!" {n}Contradicting himself, Seberian stands idle, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

"Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

"Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

languages.text: "Wartet!" {n}Entgegen seines eigenen Befehls zögert Seberian und blickt hilflos auf seine Tochter.{/n} "Gebt mir etwas Zeit, mich zu verabschieden, {name}! Oh, wie grausam ist der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} in Seiner Gnade und wie nachlässig ist Sein Schutz ..."
languages.original_text: "Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

traits.locale_text: "Wartet!" {n}Entgegen seines eigenen Befehls zögert Seberian und blickt hilflos auf seine Tochter.{/n} "Gebt mir etwas Zeit, mich zu verabschieden, {name}! Oh, wie grausam ist der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} in Seiner Gnade und wie nachlässig ist Sein Schutz ..."

languages.text: « Attendez ! » {n}Mais contrairement à l'ordre qu'il vient de donner, Seberian hésite, observant sa fille d'un air désespéré.{/n} « Laissez-moi lui faire mes adieux, {name} ! Oh, comme l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} se montre cruel dans Sa mansuétude et négligent dans Sa protection... »
languages.original_text: "Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

traits.locale_text: « Attendez ! » {n}Mais contrairement à l'ordre qu'il vient de donner, Seberian hésite, observant sa fille d'un air désespéré.{/n} « Laissez-moi lui faire mes adieux, {name} ! Oh, comme l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} se montre cruel dans Sa mansuétude et négligent dans Sa protection... »

languages.text: «¡Alto!». {n}Ignorando su propia orden, Seberian duda mientras mira con impotencia a su hija.{/n} «¡Permítame unos instantes para despedirme, {name}! Oh, qué cruel es el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} en Su piedad y qué negligente en Su protección...».
languages.original_text: "Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

traits.locale_text: «¡Alto!». {n}Ignorando su propia orden, Seberian duda mientras mira con impotencia a su hija.{/n} «¡Permítame unos instantes para despedirme, {name}! Oh, qué cruel es el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} en Su piedad y qué negligente en Su protección...».

languages.text: "Dur!" {n}Seberian, emrinin aksine tereddüt ediyor ve çaresizce kızına bakıyor.{/n} "Veda etmem için bana zaman ver {name}! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} merhametinde ne kadar zalim, korumasında ne kadar ihmalkâr..."
languages.original_text: "Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

traits.locale_text: "Dur!" {n}Seberian, emrinin aksine tereddüt ediyor ve çaresizce kızına bakıyor.{/n} "Veda etmem için bana zaman ver {name}! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} merhametinde ne kadar zalim, korumasında ne kadar ihmalkâr..."

languages.text: “等等！”{n}但与他下达的命令相反，塞贝里安犹豫了，无助地凝视着自己的女儿。{/n}“给我一点时间道别吧，{name}。啊，{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}的慈悲何其残忍，祂的庇佑又是何等疏忽……”
languages.original_text: "Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

traits.locale_text: “等等！”{n}但与他下达的命令相反，塞贝里安犹豫了，无助地凝视着自己的女儿。{/n}“给我一点时间道别吧，{name}。啊，{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}的慈悲何其残忍，祂的庇佑又是何等疏忽……”

languages.text: 「待て！」{n}しかし、彼の命令に反して、セベリアンは娘を見つめながら躊躇する。{/n}「別れを告げるために、少しだけ時間をください、{name}！ああ、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}の慈悲は残酷で、彼の庇護は怠慢だ…」
languages.original_text: "Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."

traits.locale_text: 「待て！」{n}しかし、彼の命令に反して、セベリアンは娘を見つめながら躊躇する。{/n}「別れを告げるために、少しだけ時間をください、{name}！ああ、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}の慈悲は残酷で、彼の庇護は怠慢だ…」
